name: American Ventures Acquisition Corp. I
business: The company is a blank check company incorporated for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any business combination target and has not initiated any substantive discussions. The company intends to focus on businesses that align with the advancement of U.S. industrial capacity, technological leadership and innovation, and economic resilience.

exposures.sentence: Our objective is to target businesses that are not only well-positioned for long-term, sustainable growth, but also deeply aligned with the advancement of U.S. industrial capacity, technological leadership and innovation, and economic resilience.
